prompt: Who should I reach out to? I've been slacking on keeping up with people.
description: User wants to see overdue contacts

prompt: I have a meeting with Jane tomorrow, what do I need to know?
description: User wants meeting prep for a specific contact

prompt: I just had coffee with Bob and we talked about his new startup idea.
description: User wants to log an interaction

prompt: I forgot to log it but I ran into Sarah at the grocery store 3 days ago. We chatted briefly.
description: User wants to log a past interaction with --when

prompt: I want to make sure I talk to Mike every two weeks.
description: User wants to set tracking frequency

prompt: Help me go through all my unorganized contacts and categorize them.
description: User wants bulk triage of contacts

prompt: I don't need to track my dentist Dr. Phillips. Hide them permanently.
description: User wants to permanently ignore a contact

prompt: My friend Alex is traveling abroad for the next 3 months, I don't need reminders about them until they're back.
description: User wants temporary suppression (snooze, not ignore)

prompt: Add Lisa to my professional contacts group.
description: User wants to assign a contact to a group

prompt: Give me an overview of how I'm doing with keeping up with people.
When was the last time I talked to Tom and what did we discuss?
description: User wants interaction history for a contact

prompt: Show me everyone in my address book, even people I'm not tracking.
description: User wants to see all contacts including untracked

prompt: I don't want to track my interactions with Carol anymore but don't hide her completely.
Set a monthly check-in reminder for Dave.
description: User wants monthly frequency — tests duration format knowledge

prompt: Who am I overdue to contact?
description: Ambiguous phrasing that should trigger check, not list
